briefdescription.para: This table contains the function pointers for all possible states.

detaileddescription.para: The order of elements must match the XMipi_MenuType enumerator definitions.

briefdescription.para: Demo mode 0-colorbar 1-pass through.
Video pattern.
This function implements the MIPI main menu state.

parameterdescription.para: is the value used for the next menu state decoder.

briefdescription.para: This function implements the MIPI resolution menu state.

parameterdescription.para: is the value used for the next menu state decoder.

briefdescription.para: This function implements the MIPI Lanes menu state.

parameterdescription.para: is the value used for the next menu state decoder.

briefdescription.para: This function displays the MIPI main menu.
This function displays the MIPI resolution menu.
This function displays the CSI2 Rx Subsystem Lanes menu.
This function outputs the video timing , Audio, Link Status, HDMI RX state of HDMI RX core.

detaileddescription.para: In addition, it also prints information about HDMI TX, and HDMI GT cores.

None.
None. In addition, it also prints information about HDMI TX, and HDMI GT cores.

None.
None.
None. In addition, it also prints information about HDMI TX, and HDMI GT cores.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *VphyPtr, XV_HdmiTxSs *HdmiTxSsPtr, XVidC_VideoMode VideoMode, XVidC_ColorFormat ColorFormat, XVidC_ColorDepth Bpc)
memberdef.name: EnableColorBar

briefdescription.para: This function enables the ColorBar.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VPHY core instance.
is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs instance.
is the resolution that is to be displayed
that can be RGB888 or YUV422 or YUV420
is the Bits per color that can be 8 or 10 or 12

briefdescription.para: This function clones the EDID of the connected sink device to the HDMI RX.
This function resets TPG IP.
This function generates video pattern.
This function enables MIPI DSI SS.
This function resets image processing pipe.
This function resets IMX274 camera sensor.

detaileddescription.para:
None.
None. This function resets IMX274 camera sensor.

briefdescription.para: This function takes care of the MIPI menu initialization.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMipi_Menu instance.
points to the base address of PS uart.

briefdescription.para: This function resets the menu to the main menu.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMipi_Menu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is called to trigger the MIPI menu state machine.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMipi_Menu instance.

briefdescription.para: This file contains the Xilinx Menu implementation as used in the MIPI example design.

detaileddescription.para: Please see xmipi_menu.h for more details.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 pg 12/07/17 Initial release.
